summary: Iteration 108: Playlists/Journeys Feature - All 17 backend tests passed, all frontend UI features verified. Complete implementation of preset playlists with auto-advancing, crossfade transitions, curated starter journeys, and Now Playing bar.
seed_data_creation: 4 curated playlists auto-seeded on first GET /api/mixer-presets/playlists/featured call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playlists/Journeys system fully implemented. 4 curated playlists seeded: Cosmic Exploration (55min, 4 steps), Deep Sleep Protocol (45min, 3 steps), Morning to Night Journey (155min, 5 steps), Quick Recharge (15min, 3 steps). Each step references a featured preset by name/ID with duration in minutes. Now Playing bar auto-advances when step duration exceeded.

backend_apis.GET /api/mixer-presets/playlists/feature: PASS - Returns 4 curated playlists with all required fields
backend_apis.GET /api/mixer-presets/playlists/communi: PASS - Returns public playlists sorted by like_count
backend_apis.GET /api/mixer-presets/playlists/mine: PASS - Returns user's personal playlists, requires auth
backend_apis.POST /api/mixer-presets/playlists: PASS - Creates new playlist with steps, calculates total_minutes
backend_apis.POST /api/mixer-presets/playlists/:id/li: PASS - Toggles like status, returns liked boolean and like_count
backend_apis.DELETE /api/mixer-presets/playlists/:id: PASS - Deletes user's own playlist, returns 404 for others'

frontend_ui.journeys_button: PASS - data-testid='playlists-browse-btn' visible in Production Console toolbar
frontend_ui.playlist_cards: PASS - Show name, description, duration badge, step chain, Begin Journey button
frontend_ui.now_playing_bar: PASS - data-testid='playlist-now-playing' shows step info and timer
frontend_ui.progress_bar: PASS - Shows progress within current step
frontend_ui.step_dots: PASS - Visual indicators for completed/current/upcoming steps
frontend_ui.prev_button: PASS - data-testid='playlist-prev' navigates to previous step
frontend_ui.pause_button: PASS - data-testid='playlist-pause' pauses/resumes timer, shows 'Paused' state
frontend_ui.next_button: PASS - data-testid='playlist-next' navigates to next step
frontend_ui.stop_button: PASS - data-testid='playlist-stop' stops playlist and removes Now Playing bar

curated_playlists.name: Cosmic Exploration
curated_playlists.description: Journey through spiritual dimensions with ascending frequencies

curated_playlists.name: Morning to Night Journey
curated_playlists.description: A full-day meditation progression from awakening energy to deep sleep
